channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. faces Belgium in World Cup after Trump-Infantino red card controversy
item.description: Striker Folarin Balogun is expected to start against Belgium following a surprise FIFA decision allowing him to play.

item.title: Fast walkers in their 80s cut cognitive decline risk by half, study finds
item.description: A study of people 80 and older with exceptional gaits found fast walkers have about 50% lower risk of cognitive decline.

item.title: 7 creative ways to turn leftovers into new meals and reduce food waste
item.description: Audience members share their favorite leftover recipes, including stuffed peppers and biryani casserole.

item.title: Marriage once offered a clear path to citizenship, but now faces more obstacles
item.description: Spouses of U.S. citizens traditionally held a privileged status in immigration law, but that has changed under the current administration.
